raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The City of Irvine will renovate Sweet Shade Neighborhood Park into a Universal Playground that meets the needs of all residents regardless of ability.",
    "The new Universal Playground will feature interactive sensory learning activities for special needs individuals.",
    "The Universal Playground in Irvine will include multigenerational play components to support usage by those with disabilities and their caregivers.",
    "The playground will be wheelchair accessible and include interactive equipment for a variety of ages.",
    "The Universal Playground will be the first of its kind in Irvine, designed with differently-abled residents at its center.",
    "The playground will allow wheelchair users to play alongside their peers.",
    "The City of Irvine aims to create a fun, safe recreational space for individuals with sensory, physical, or cognitive disabilities."
  ]
}
```
